Omega PLANET OCEAN 6000M CO‑AXIAL MASTER CHRONOMETER 45.5 MM
Condition report:
In 2019, the Ultra Deep dive took place as part of the Five Deeps expedition. This model went down in history by visiting the deepest point of our planet. Following the world's deepest dive, these watches were adapted into a collection made available to the general public. During development, this watch was tested in real sea conditions. It is water-resistant to 6,000 meters (20,000 feet) and meets the ISO 6425:2018 standard designed for professional dive watches.

The 45.5mm model is made from durable O-MEGASTEEL material and features a polished orange ceramic bezel with a liquid ceramic diving scale and Super-LumiNova coating. The hands and indexes are made of 18-karat white gold and coated with white Super-LumiNova. The gray to black lacquered dial features four orange Arabic numerals, visible through the domed sapphire crystal.

The watch is complemented by an O-MEGASTEEL bracelet with OMEGA's patented push-button frame folding clasp with an extension system. The case back features a Grade 5 titanium medallion engraved with the Sonar emblem with the iconic seahorse at the center. The watch is powered by the OMEGA Co-Axial Master Chronometer 8912 movement.

Omega PLANET OCEAN 6000M CO‑AXIAL MASTER CHRONOMETER 45.5 MM
Condition report:
In 2019, the Ultra Deep dive took place as part of the Five Deeps expedition. This model went down in history by visiting the deepest point of our planet. Following the world's deepest dive, these watches were adapted into a collection made available to the general public. During development, this watch was tested in real sea conditions. It is water-resistant to 6,000 meters (20,000 feet) and meets the ISO 6425:2018 standard designed for professional dive watches.

The 45.5mm model is made from durable O-MEGASTEEL material and features a polished orange ceramic bezel with a liquid ceramic diving scale and Super-LumiNova coating. The hands and indexes are made of 18-karat white gold and coated with white Super-LumiNova. The gray to black lacquered dial features four orange Arabic numerals, visible through the domed sapphire crystal.

The watch is complemented by an O-MEGASTEEL bracelet with OMEGA's patented push-button frame folding clasp with an extension system. The case back features a Grade 5 titanium medallion engraved with the Sonar emblem with the iconic seahorse at the center. The watch is powered by the OMEGA Co-Axial Master Chronometer 8912 movement.
